context:
BrainCipher INTELрҹ”Қ
===================
рҹ“ҢBrain Cipher emerged in July 2024, infected about 23 victims (as of 2024 December)
рҹ“Ң5 Victims are added in 2025 (till April)
рҹ“ҢBoth Windows and Linux variants are available for BrainCipher 
рҹ’ЎSome of the announced leaks are removed, suspecting a succesfull negotiation or any storage challenge
рҹ“ҢNotable for leaking Indonesia's National Data Center
рҹ“ҢListed Deloitte UK; but didn't post any data
рҹ“ҢTargeted Countries: рҹҮәрҹҮё, рҹҮ«рҹҮ·, рҹҮ®рҹҮұ, рҹҮІрҹҮҪ рҹҮҰрҹҮ· рҹҮ§рҹҮ· рҹҮЁрҹҮҫ рҹҮ®рҹҮұ рҹҮөрҹҮ№
рҹ“ҢMost Targeted Sector: Service, Law, Manufacturer
рҹ“ҢUsing Network Tunneling for C2 Communications
рҹ’ЎBrain Cipher using the leaked build of LockBit Black for their operations
рҹ’ЎMost of their samples are collected from VX Underground Repository
рҹ’ЎThe encrypted extensions are borrowed from LockBit as they are using LockBit's leaked build for their operations
рҹ’ЎThe group suspected to have exploited CVE-2023-28252 (Microsoft Windows CLFS Driver Privilege Escalation Vulnerability)
рҹ’ЎThe Ransom demand ranges from $150,000 to $1,00,0000
рҹ’ЎDemand to be paid with Monero (XMR) cryptocurrency
рҹ’ЎIn 2025, they have shifted their new Negotiation portal to new server with vanity TOR Domain starting with "brain"
рҹ’ЎFile Sharing Server of BrainCipher is hosted with nginx/1.18.0 (Ubuntu)
рҹ“Ң"BrainCipher Client Area" is the name assigned for Negotiation Portal
рҹ’ЎMost targeted filename of BrainCipher Ransomware is win_old.exe
рҹ“ҢThe group added a title "TRUSTED DATALEAK BY OUR TEAM OF 2026" in 2026 and only kept few victims on their DLS. 


DLS: vkvsgl7lhipjirmz6j5ubp3w3bwvxgcdbpi3fsbqngfynetqtw4w5hyd.onion
